pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-S-001 (Risk and Compliance/Skill) scores 0.431 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.431) and is in_scope for the ISO 8000 Data Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level ISO 8000 Data Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, EU AI Act signal (0.431), and Risk and Compliance handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Market evidence supports this competency for ISO 8000 Data Manager. Final decision: include.
